title: Add TX support and full packet flow for hat mode
description: Extend run_hat_inner to support TX from upstream_to_mesh/gateway, handle concentrator TX queue. Update forward functions if needed for concentrator backend. Add basic test vectors or integration test.
close_reason: Extended run_hat_inner with TX queue using VecDeque for upstream_to_mesh SCHC payloads; added transmit() to Concentrator trait and Sx1302Concentrator stub; drain after select! mirrors serial/sim patterns; full packet flow enabled for TX direction (RX in sibling bead); no new subbeads
